news.headline: US Treasury Secretary Bessent when asked about Trump's threatened 200% tariff on EU alcohol: I am not sure why one or two items from one or two trading blocks is a big deal.
Atlassian Williams Racing partners with Brillio for global digital transformation ahead of 2025 FIA Formula 1 with multi-year commitment.
news.summary: At the start of the 2025 FIA Formula 1 World Championship season in Melbourne this weekend, Atlassian Williams Racing has revealed a significant multi-year collaboration with Brillio, a renowned global technology consulting company. This partnership signifies a strategic move for the racing team as they gear up for the upcoming races.

news.headline: Clarifai's AI Orchestration Platform now available on AWS Marketplace, expanding reach to more users.
news.summary: Today, Clarifai, a prominent AI company, revealed that its AI Orchestration Platform will now be available on AWS Marketplace. This significant move comes as Clarifai continues to lead in the AI sector, offering a comprehensive AI platform. The announcement was made in Washington on March 13, 2025. This development signifies increased accessibility as users can now leverage Clarifai's orchestration platform through the AWS platform.

news.headline: MATELASER launches X1 Performance, a portable high-energy laser therapy system for pain management.
news.summary: In a recent press release dated March 13, 2025, Matelaser Inc. revealed the introduction of the X1 Performance, a cutting-edge portable high-energy laser therapy system. This system, aimed at top-tier pain management, aligns with stringent U.S. medical quality benchmarks. Matelaser Inc. underscores its commitment to advancing laser therapy technology, marking a noteworthy development in the medical field.

news.headline: Sadiaa Black Beauty Guide to host panel on legacy building for Black beauty brands at IBS NYC amid industry shifts and reduced DEI efforts by major retailers.
news.summary: In New York on March 13, 2025, the beauty industry is experiencing changes as prominent retailers reduce their efforts towards diversity, equity, and inclusion. This shift highlights the growing importance of independent growth within the Black beauty sector. Sadiaa Black Beauty Guide is taking proactive steps to address this need by organizing initiatives to support and promote Black beauty.

news.headline: BJ Energy Solutions, LLC receives fifth set of TITAN Hydraulic Fracturing Units from Jereh Energy; March 13, 2025.
news.summary: A company based in The Woodlands, Texas, BJ Energy Solutions, LLC, recently disclosed that they have acquired a fifth set of their unique TITANTM Natural Gas Fueled Direct Drive Turbine Fracturing Units from Jereh Energy Equipment. This development occurred on March 13, 2025.

news.headline: Global geospatial analytics market to reach $55.75 billion by 2029 from $32.97 billion in 2024, with various sectors benefiting.
news.summary: A report on the Geospatial Analytics Market has been recently added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The market is expected to witness significant growth, with projections indicating an increase from USD 32.97 billion in 2024 to USD 55.75 billion by 2029. This growth represents a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) within this period. The report covers various aspects of the market including software types (such as Geocoding, Thematic Mapping, ETL, Spatial Data), technologies (Sensors, LiDAR, Radar, GPR, EML, GNSS, GIS, ML), data types (Raster Data, Vector Data, 3D Data, Tabular Data), and verticals.

news.headline: Sysdig appoints Gary Olson as CRO and Crendal Kear as CBO after 337% growth in Sysdig Sage usage.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Sysdig, a top provider of real-time cloud security, has named Gary Olson as Chief Revenue Officer (CRO) and Crendal Kear as Chief Business Officer (CBO) in response to a significant 337% surge in Sysdig Sage™ user adoption in just eight months. Sysdig Sage, known as the first AI cloud security analyst with autonomous capabilities, employs multi-step reasoning and contextual awareness to aid security personnel in identifying, comprehending, and resolving issues effectively.

news.headline: YOSHIKI to perform U.S. & Japanese anthems at 2025 MLB Opening Day in Tokyo. Global icon returns post neck surgery.
news.summary: After undergoing neck surgery, the world-famous artist YOSHIKI has made a remarkable comeback and will be performing for Major League Baseball (MLB) at the beginning of the historic 2025 season in Tokyo. This iconic event highlights an exceptional season kickoff.

news.headline: KS&R appoints Christine Nelson to Executive Committee, enhancing leadership for growth & innovation. - Syracuse, NY on March 13, 2025.
news.summary: Syracuse, New York, March 13, 2025 - KS&R, a top strategic consultancy and marketing research firm, is enhancing its long-term growth and innovation by expanding its strategic leadership team. Christine Nelson has been appointed to the Executive Committee. This move is geared towards strengthening the company's direction and fostering innovation.

news.headline: T-Mobile, Thales, and SIMPL partner for secure IoT deployments, addressing challenges with a flexible solution.
news.summary: In MEUDON, France, an important partnership has been formed between T-Mobile, Thales, and SIMPL IoT to revolutionize device management in the expansive IoT market. This collaboration aims to address the challenges faced in managing extensive IoT deployments with various device configurations, focusing on security, simplicity, and connectivity. With the increasing importance of seamless connectivity in IoT operations, this strategic alliance is poised to offer a secure end-to-end solution for IoT players, enhancing operational efficiency. This collaboration is expected to bring substantial advancements in device management within the IoT sector, catering to the growing demands for connectivity.

news.headline: Facteus introduces Onyx dataset with $400B potential value, covering 5 years of transactions across 138 tickers and 20,000+ store locations.
news.summary: Access a reliable advantage with the swiftest and most reliable SKU-level transaction dataset, encapsulating five years of transactions across 138 tickers and over 20,000 store locations. Facteus, a prominent provider of consumer transaction data and insights, made this announcement from Portland, Oregon, on March 13, 2025.

news.headline: Contentnea Health in North Carolina partners with eClinicalWorks for cloud EHR system, aimed at streamlining workflows at health centers. 35-provider Federally Qualified Health Center chooses eClinicalWorks for medical, dental, behavioral health, vision, and UDS+ needs.
news.summary: In Westborough, Massachusetts, eClinicalWorks revealed that Contentnea Health will implement its cloud-based EHR system to enhance efficiencies within their health centers. Contentnea Health, a North Carolina FQHC with 35 providers, opted for eClinicalWorks for its comprehensive solution tailored to the diverse requirements of health centers, such as medical, dental, behavioral health, vision, and UDS+. By utilizing the AI-driven EHR system, Contentnea Health aims to streamline their workflows effectively.

news.headline: Shaquille O'Neal invests in BeatBox Beverages, launching exclusive Blueberry Lemonade nationwide.
news.summary: A new Blueberry Lemonade flavor has been released nationwide in partnership with basketball legend and entertainer Shaquille O'Neal. The product launch took place in Austin, Texas on March 13, 2025. Shaquille O'Neal, known for his basketball career and entertainment ventures, collaborated with BeatBox Beverages to introduce this exclusive product to consumers across the country.

news.headline: Talkdesk introduces After Hours to extend sales/service beyond business hours, enhancing customer & agent happiness.
news.summary: In Palo Alto, California, Talkdesk is assisting companies in expanding their sales and customer service to cater to customers outside regular business hours with Talkdesk After Hours. This initiative by #AgenticAI aims to enhance customer support beyond the conventional operating hours and improve overall customer experience.

news.headline: Paige launches AI app for GI tract diagnosis. Paige GI Suite assists in detecting common conditions, covering all regions.
news.summary: A new AI-assisted diagnostic application, the Paige GI Suite, has been introduced by Paige, a leading next-gen AI technology company. This tool is specifically designed to aid pathologists in identifying prevalent conditions within the gastrointestinal (GI) tract. In contrast to other AI solutions concentrating on one tissue type, the Paige GI Suite offers a holistic approach, allowing AI-assisted examination of biopsies from any part of the GI tract. This cutting-edge solution is set to revolutionize the detection process with its comprehensive system-wide capabilities.

news.headline: Donny Osmond extends Harrah's Las Vegas residency through Nov 2025, incorporating AI technology for unique concert experience.
news.summary: Renowned musician Donny Osmond has confirmed the continuation of his successful residency at Harrah’s Showroom in Las Vegas until November 2025. As part of his show, Osmond has embraced a progressive technology trend by utilizing his Artificial Intelligence (AI) likeness to enhance the live concert experience for audiences. This innovative approach aims to provide fans with a unique and unforgettable performance. The extension of Osmond's residency showcases his ongoing popularity and success in the entertainment industry.

news.headline: Intrepid Fiber Networks starts construction for fiber broadband in Superior, CO offering multi-gigabit speeds to revolutionize digital infrastructure.
news.summary: Intrepid Fiber Networks recently marked the start of construction on its open-access fiber broadband network in Superior, Colorado, with a groundbreaking ceremony. This initiative promises to bring symmetrical, multi-gigabit internet speeds to residents and businesses, elevating the city's digital infrastructure and catering to future broadband needs. The project is set to connect a large portion of Superior's population, demonstrating a significant leap in the city's technological advancement.

news.headline: Real Time Medical Systems to present at PALTC25 on value-based care strategies; Founder Dr. Scott Rifkin to speak on March 13-15, 2025 in Charlotte, NC.
news.summary: Real Time Medical Systems (Real Time) shared that its founder and Executive Chairman, Dr. Scott Rifkin, is scheduled to speak at the Post-Acute Long-Term Care (PALTC) 2025 Annual Conference in Charlotte, NC from March 13-15, 2025. Real Time is known for being industry-leading, KLAS Rated, and HITRUST Certified in post-acute analytics solutions. This conference aims to bring together industry leaders, medical directors, and healthcare professionals to discuss staying updated on clinical quality standards and discovering cutting-edge advancements.

news.headline: Michael McGuire appointed President of XR Pay, a division of XR, specializing in finance solutions for advertising and entertainment.
news.summary: XR, a leading global technology company, has appointed Michael McGuire as the President of XR Pay, a specialized division offering full payroll and financial services for the advertising and entertainment sectors. McGuire's primary responsibility will be spearheading the growth of XR Pay by refining production finance and improving payroll services to support business development and ensure client satisfaction. With a vast experience exceeding 25 years in enterprise hardware, software, and services, McGuire is well-positioned to steer XR Pay towards success.

news.headline: Northwind Midstream expands gas system in NM with 150 MMcf/d treating capacity, 200 miles of pipelines, and 41,750hp compression.
news.summary: In Houston, Northwind Midstream Partners LLC unveiled the completion and operation of a significant infrastructure project. The company has successfully built and activated 150 million cubic feet per day (MMcf/d) of high-circulation amine treating capacity. Additionally, they have established two acid-gas disposal and carbon sequestration wells, laid down over 200 miles of large-diameter pipelines, and installed 41,750 horsepower of compression distributed among five compressor stations. This extensive system development by Northwind has been supported by enduring agreements and commitments, with a substantial backing of greater than 165,000.

news.headline: Mobeus introduces "tele" to bridge gap between AI agents and consumer adoption, addressing disappointing adoption rates.
news.summary: In Sparta, New Jersey, AI agents are advancing at a rapid pace, becoming more specialized and integrated. However, a gap in consumer interaction is emerging as their capabilities grow, leading to low adoption rates, unsuccessful business implementations, and missed ROI opportunities. Addressing this issue, Mobeus has unveiled the "tele," an innovative consumer-friendly agentic user interface. The tele aims to bridge the existing divide, offering an intuitive solution for seamless interaction with AI agents. This development comes as a response to the need for easier engagement with these advanced systems.

news.headline: American Water promotes digital options for customer account management; offers MyWater, a self-service portal for easy access.
news.summary: In Camden, New Jersey, American Water (NYSE: AWK), the leading regulated water and wastewater utility firm in the U.S., emphasizes the convenience for customers to handle their accounts and access information 24/7 through the online self-service customer portal, MyWater, and the company's website. The main focus for American Water is on providing safe, clean, reliable, and cost-effective water and wastewater services to its customers.

news.headline: H2O.ai launches Enterprise LLM Studio on Dell infra for domain-specific models. Offers Fine-Tuning-as-a-Service, automating LLM lifecycle.
news.summary: Based in Mountain View, California, H2O.ai has unveiled the H2O Enterprise LLM Studio, which operates on Dell infrastructure. This fresh solution offers Fine-Tuning-as-a-Service for enterprises to effectively train, assess, and implement domain-specific AI models using their data. With a team comprised of the industry's leading Kaggle Grandmasters, the Enterprise LLM Studio streamlines the LLM lifecycle - handling data generation, curation, and fine-tuning efficiently.

news.headline: Nintendo to open 2nd US store in San Francisco on May 15 at Union Square, 331 Powell Street; will offer unique shopping experience.
news.summary: Nintendo is set to open its second official store in the United States on May 15th, located at 331 Powell Street in San Francisco's Union Square. The store, named Nintendo SAN FRANCISCO, aims to provide a unique shopping experience for guests of all ages. In addition to offering game systems and games, the store will also feature exclusive products and merchandise showcasing Nintendo's characters and worlds. The opening of Nintendo SAN FRANCISCO is anticipated to attract visitors locally and from afar, promising to bring smiles to gaming enthusiasts.

news.headline: Callan JMB (NASDAQ: CJMB) to attend March investor conferences in 2025 with focus on healthcare and emergency management.
news.summary: Today, in Spring Branch, Texas, Callan JMB INC. (NASDAQ: CJMB) revealed its involvement in upcoming investor conferences in March 2025. The company, specializing in logistics services for the healthcare sector and emergency agencies, offers fulfillment, storage, monitoring, and cold chain services. This announcement by Callan JMB highlights its commitment to engaging with investors and expanding its presence in the industry.

news.headline: US Treasury Secretary Bessent when asked about stock market: We are focused over the medium and long-term.
US Treasury Secretary Bessent: A US government shutdown would be disruptive.
US Treasury Secretary Bessent when asked about the stock market: I am not concerned about a little volitity over three weeks.
Integrity Co-Founder & CEO Bryan W. Adams honored as Top 100 CEO for Large Companies based on employee feedback from 70K+ firms.
news.summary: In a recent workplace culture survey conducted by Comparably, Integrity Marketing Group, LLC ("Integrity"), a top distributor of life and health products, received recognition. This survey compiled feedback from over 70,000 companies in the United States and Canada. The acknowledgment is a testament to Integrity's commitment to fostering a positive work environment. The surveyors highlighted Integrity's noteworthy performance and dedication based on the anonymous responses collected.

news.headline: Steller releases Steller Connect, a tool for DMOs in the US, in 2025 for better travel planning and connectivity.
news.summary: In Kirkland, Washington, on March 13, 2025, Steller has introduced Steller Connect, a feature designed for Destination Marketing Organizations (DMOs). Steller is a platform centered around video content for travel planning, where users can explore, engage, and make bookings inspired by creators' experiences. Steller Connect serves as a tool for DMOs to establish connections within the platform.

news.headline: Pure Source, a contract manufacturer, marks 30 years of operations in Personal Care & OTC industries. Owned and operated in the US, it offers custom products to clients.
news.summary: Celebrating its 30th anniversary, Pure Source, a contract manufacturer and global supplier of personal care and OTC products based in the U.S., has been a leader in private label and custom product manufacturing. Established in 1995, the company has grown to become a trusted name in the industry, producing a wide range of products for clients worldwide.

news.headline: Fortified Health Security wins Frost & Sullivan's 2024 North American Customer Value Leadership Award for cybersecurity in healthcare.
news.summary: Fortified Health Security's cutting-edge cybersecurity services prioritize customer needs, aiding healthcare providers in defending against cyber threats and improving security operations. A report by Frost & Sullivan, released on March 13, 2025 in San Antonio, highlights the company's customer-driven strategy. This approach has led to significant improvements in cybersecurity for healthcare providers, with a notable increase in secure operations and threat mitigation.

news.headline: Review: Apple's iPhone 16e disappoints with high price, lacking features.
news.summary: A recent report has revealed that the global unemployment rate has increased by 0.7% in the last quarter, reaching a total of 190 million unemployed individuals worldwide. The study highlighted that the youth unemployment rate is particularly concerning, with an estimated 73 million young people currently out of work. Additionally, it was found that the job market in developing countries has been heavily impacted, with a 1.4% rise in unemployment rates. The report also indicated that women have been disproportionately affected, making up 40% of the global unemployed population. Overall, the data portrays a grim picture of the current state of the global job market.

news.headline: Mondelēz partners with 9 NCAA athletes to promote March Madness, featuring Juju Watkins and Jackson Shelstad.
news.summary: Mondelēz has announced a collaboration with nine current and former NCAA® athletes to generate enthusiasm during the tournament. Based in East Hanover, N.J., the company has been an Official Corporate Partner of the NCAA® for more than ten years. This new partnership aims to leverage the influence of NCAA® athletes to create engagement and generate interest.

news.headline: Inventor creates robotic toy to mimic real pets, addressing children's desire to own pets. (CBA-3562)
news.summary: In March 13, 2025, in Pittsburgh, a groundbreaking invention was unveiled by an inventor from Clarksburg, Md. The inventor shared the motivation behind the creation of a unique product aimed at simulating the behaviors and requirements of a real pet. Addressing the desire of children to experience the joy of owning a pet, the inventor identified a gap in the skills needed to care for them. As a solution, the inventor developed a revolutionary concept designed to provide the benefits of pet ownership without the challenges. The innovation is set to transform the way children interact with artificial pets, with numbers indicating a promising impact on the industry.

news.headline: UK's Celnor Group acquires New England's John Turner Consulting, a move signaling growth, marking a milestone. Founded in 1997, John Turner...
news.summary: London, March 13, 2025 - The British company Celnor Group, which offers testing, inspection, certification, and compliance services, has disclosed its latest business move of acquiring John Turner Consulting, a company from New England. This acquisition, which stands as a key milestone in Celnor Group's expansion, comes after John Turner Consulting was established in 1997.

news.headline: PartnerLinQ now available on Google Cloud Marketplace, expanding reach from Microsoft Azure, a multi-cloud solution.
news.summary: PartnerLinQ, a prominent multi-cloud enterprise connectivity solution, has recently expanded its availability to Google Cloud Platform (GCP) after being accessible on Microsoft Azure. The move, made on March 13, 2025, marks an important milestone for PartnerLinQ as it broadens its reach to a wider customer base. Prior to this expansion, PartnerLinQ was only accessible on Microsoft Azure. This availability on Google Cloud Marketplace opens up new opportunities for customers to utilize PartnerLinQ's services, making it more convenient for businesses to access the platform. This move signifies PartnerLinQ's commitment to enhancing its accessibility and catering to a larger audience in the cloud marketplace.

news.headline: Addressable introduces new metric CPW for crypto wallets, 18x more likely to convert, boosts marketing efficiency.
news.summary: Addressable, a Web3 marketing firm, has introduced a new metric called cost per wallet (CPW) on March 13, aiming to enhance user acquisition tracking for DApps and blockchain companies. CPW focuses on tracking onchain wallet activity rather than traditional Web2 metrics like cost per acquisition and cost per click. Addressable claims that CPW allows businesses to identify high-value users who are more likely to convert to crypto products. Users with wallets are found to be 18 times more likely to sign up and seven times more likely to convert to crypto products, making CPW a more effective metric compared to traditional ones. This new metric could help crypto projects track active participants in DeFi protocols, wallets, and exchanges. While CPW targets retail user acquisition, the crypto industry is also increasingly focusing on institutional adoption. Etherealize, a firm backed by the Ethereum Foundation, aims to educate institutions about blockchain and Ether, aiming to bring Wall Street onto Ethereum rails.

news.headline: Coronado Research names Nick Littlebury as EVP, Regulatory Affairs, bringing his expertise in pharmaceutical industry.
news.summary: In London on March 13, 2025, Coronado Research announced the appointment of Nick Littlebury as Executive Vice President of Regulatory Affairs. Littlebury, a seasoned regulatory leader, brings a wealth of expertise in the pharmaceutical sector, having managed strategic and operational aspects throughout various stages of product development. His prior leadership roles involved overseeing regulatory affairs, further strengthening Coronado Research's regulatory capabilities.

news.headline: Accelerate event in Austin on March 13, 2025 will showcase industry leaders redefining home buying in a digital world.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas on March 13, 2025, Zonda will host Accelerate, a cutting-edge sales and marketing conference showcasing top industry speakers. The event is set to bring together sales and marketing leaders to discuss future trends in home building. Attendees can expect valuable insights from industry icons and experts.

news.headline: OptiMine partners with ANA, enhancing marketing strategies with measurement expertise. Collaboration to drive growth.
news.summary: In Minneapolis on March 13, 2025, OptiMine, a prominent company specializing in agile marketing measurement and optimization, revealed a significant development. They have entered into a strategic partnership with the Association of National Advertisers (ANA). This collaboration intends to leverage OptiMine's extensive knowledge in marketing and enhance the capabilities of both entities in the industry.

news.headline: ManpowerGroup introduces 2025 VivaTech Startup Challenge to innovate talent experience using AI in the workplace.
news.summary: In Milwaukee on March 13, 2025, ManpowerGroup announced the launch of its 2025 Viva Technology Startup Challenge titled "AI, Tech, & #huManpower: Redefining the Future of Work." This initiative aims to explore innovative solutions in the era of artificial intelligence. The challenge signifies the company's commitment to adapting to a rapidly evolving business landscape, with a focus on reshaping industries through cutting-edge technology. The competition seeks to uncover groundbreaking approaches to work-related issues and is set to attract a wide array of participants.

news.headline: US Treasury Secretary Bessent: The aim is long-term gains for markets and the American people.
US Treasury Secretary Bessent: We are focused on the real economy.
HopSkipDrive introduces 4 safety initiatives to improve student transpo. 99.7% rides in 2024 completed without issues.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, HopSkipDrive, a tech company addressing transportation challenges with a focus on safety and care, unveiled four safety initiatives to strengthen their dedication to safe student transportation. Their sixth annual Safety Report revealed that 99.7% of rides in 2024 were incident-free. As part of the new measures, HopSkipDrive aims to enhance safety protocols and further ensure reliable transportation for students.

news.headline:
New Political Trade Reported: US TREASURY BILLS - Buy - spouse - $50,001 - $100,000 -  - Rick Allen 
 transaction date: 2025-02-26 
 filed at date: 2025-03-12
Bassett Furniture declares $0.20 dividend/share for Q2 2025, payable on May 30 to shareholders of record on May 16.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, Bassett Furniture Industries, Inc. (Nasdaq: BSET) revealed a quarterly dividend of $0.20 per common stock share. The dividend is set to be paid on May 30, 2025, to shareholders recorded as of May 16, 2025.

news.headline: Dow Jones falls due to Trump's tariff threats; Nvidia and Tesla stocks drop. Market reacts negatively.
news.summary: On Thursday, the Dow Jones Industrial Average experienced a decline due to President Donald Trump's announcement of potential new tariffs. This resulted in a sell-off of Nvidia and Tesla stocks in the market today. The drop in the Dow Jones was significant in response to the tariff threats, impacting various sectors. These events reflect the uncertainty and volatility in the market as investors navigate the implications of the escalating trade tensions.

news.headline: Quantum computing advances with Aurora, a new quantum computer unveiled by scientists. Big leap for investors.
news.summary: Released by Scope Technologies Corp. for USA News Group, the latest revelation on March 13, 2025, discusses the rapid advancement towards a quantum computing era. Scientists recently introduced Aurora, a cutting-edge quantum computer that marks a significant milestone in this progression. This development signifies the acceleration towards achieving practical applications of quantum computing technology.
